description: Mount an existing VeraCrypt encrypted file container using the GUI. In the VeraCrypt main window, select slot 1, then click 'Select File...' and navigate to /home/ga/Volumes/data_volume.hc. Click 'Mount' and enter the password 'MountMe2024' when prompted. After mounting, the volume should appear as mounted in slot 1 and be accessible at /media/veracrypt1 (or the mount point shown in VeraCrypt).
